muslim.verse: And among His signs is that He created for you mates from among yourselves that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
muslim.shloka: وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُم مِّنْ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِّتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُم مَّوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً

hindu.citation: A sacred wedding vow from Vedic rituals, promising lifelong partnership in righteousness, prosperity, and love.
hindu.shloka: धर्मे च अर्थे च कामे च नातिचरामि

wittyOneLiners.haldi: Join the haldi and paint yellove! 💛
wittyOneLiners.reception: Celebrate the union of two beautiful hearts! 🥂

christian.verse: Love is patient, love is kind. It does not envy, it does not boast, it is not proud. It does not dishonor others, it is not self-seeking, it keeps no record of wrongs.
christian.shloka: What God has joined together, let no one separate.

wittyOneLiners.haldi: Join the haldi and paint yellove! 💛
wittyOneLiners.reception: A toast to a beautiful lifetime together! 🥂

sikh.verse: They are not said to be husband and wife, who merely sit together. Rather they alone are called husband and wife, who have one soul in two bodies.
sikh.shloka: ਧਨ ਪਿਰੁ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਬਹਨਿ ਇਕਠੇ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਏਕ ਜੋਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਮੂਰਤੀ ਧਨ ਪਿਰੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋਇ ॥

wittyOneLiners.haldi: Join the haldi and paint yellove! 💛
wittyOneLiners.reception: Cheers to a lifetime of love and companionship! 🥂

buddhist.verse: In whom there is truth, righteousness, non-violence, restraint, and self-control, such a wise person is indeed free from impurities.
buddhist.shloka: May all beings live in harmony, compassion, and peace.

wittyOneLiners.reception: Celebrate the journey of love and mindfulness! 🥂
